agents.result:
All files have been processed. Here's the structured report:

### SUMMARY
Updated 12 `delete.php` files across the emadrasah modules to add POST+CSRF validation following the `modules/guru/delete.php` template. Every file now has the CSRF guard block, uses `$_POST['id']` instead of `$_GET['id']`, and preserves all existing delete logic, file cleanup (`unlink`), business rules (e.g., active tahun check, self-delete prevention), and redirect paths. Two files (`kategori_sarana/delete.php`, `mapel/delete.php`) already had POST+CSRF and were correctly skipped along with the pre-identified `guru` and `kelas`. The `jam_pelajaran/delete.php` stub (empty `?>`) was replaced with a full implementation.

### EVIDENCE
- `modules/guru/delete.php:1-27` — template with POST+CSRF block, `$_POST['id']`, `set_flash`, redirect
- `modules/absensi/delete_pengganti.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` and `$_GET['agenda_id']`; now POST
- `modules/arsip/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with file cleanup; now POST
- `modules/buku_induk/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with foto cleanup; now POST
- `modules/jam_pelajaran/delete.php` — originally a stub (only `?>`), now full implementation with table `jam_pelajaran`
- `modules/kategori_sarana/delete.php` — read confirmed it already has POST+CSRF; skipped
- `modules/mapel/delete.php` — read confirmed it already has POST+CSRF; skipped
- `modules/sarana/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with foto cleanup; now POST
- `modules/siswa/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with foto cleanup; now POST
- `modules/surat_keluar/delete.php` — originally used `!isset($_GET['id'])` + `die()`; now POST + `set_flash`
- `modules/surat_masuk/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with file_scan cleanup; now POST
- `modules/tahun_pelajaran/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with is_aktif validation; now POST
- `modules/tasks/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with attachment cleanup; now POST
- `modules/template_surat/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']`; now POST
- `modules/users/delete.php` — originally used `!isset($_GET['id'])` + `die()`; now POST + `set_flash`

### CHANGES
- `modules/absensi/delete_pengganti.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET` to `$_POST` for both `id` and `agenda_id`
- `modules/arsip/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/buku_induk/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/jam_pelajaran/delete.php` — replaced empty stub with full POST+CSRF delete implementation (`jam_pelajaran` table)
- `modules/sarana/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/siswa/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/surat_keluar/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`, replaced `die()` with `set_flash` + redirect
- `modules/surat_masuk/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/tahun_pelajaran/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/tasks/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/template_surat/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/users/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`, replaced `die()` with `set_flash` + redirect

### RISKS
- **Incoming links still use GET**: The `index.php` files across these modules still link to `delete.php?id=...` via `<a href>` (GET). These links need to be converted to POST forms with CSRF tokens for the new server-side guard to actually work. Without updating the caller side, every delete click will be rejected by the CSRF check.
- **`absensi/delete_pengganti.php` redirect on CSRF fail**: On CSRF failure, redirects to `pengganti.php` without `agenda_id`, which may behave differently than the success redirect that includes it. This is a minor UX edge case.
- **`jam_pelajaran/delete.php` was a stub**: No previous delete logic existed; the new implementation assumes the table is `jam_pelajaran` (confirmed from `edit.php` query) and may need testing against actual DB schema.

### BLOCKERS
None.

content.content:
<?php
// emadrasah/modules/guru/delete.php
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../config/database.php';
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../includes/functions.php';

// Tambahkan validasi CSRF dan pastikan metode POST
if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] !== 'POST' || !validate_csrf_request()) {
    set_flash('danger', 'Token CSRF tidak valid atau metode tidak diizinkan.');
    header('Location: ' . base_url('guru'));
    exit;
}

$id = isset($_POST['id']) ? (int)$_POST['id'] : 0;

if ($id === 0) {
    set_flash('danger', 'ID guru tidak valid.');
    header('Location: ' . base_url('guru'));
    exit;
}

try {
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM gurus WHERE id = ?");
    if ($stmt->execute([$id])) {
        set_flash('success', 'Data guru berhasil dihapus.');
    } else {
        set_flash('danger', 'Gagal menghapus data guru.');
    }
} catch (Exception $e) {
    set_flash('danger', 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage());
}

header('Location: ' . base_url('guru'));
exit;
?>

<?php
// emadrasah/modules/absensi/delete_pengganti.php
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../config/database.php';
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../includes/functions.php';

$id = isset($_GET['id']) ? (int)$_GET['id'] : 0;
$agenda_id = isset($_GET['agenda_id']) ? (int)$_GET['agenda_id'] : 0;

if ($id) {
    try {
        $stmt = $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM guru_pengganti WHERE id = ?");
        $stmt->execute([$id]);
        set_flash('success', 'Penugasan guru pengganti telah dibatalkan.');
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        set_flash('danger', 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage());
    }
}

header("Location: pengganti.php?agenda_id=$agenda_id");
exit;
?>

<?php
// emadrasah/modules/arsip/delete.php
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../config/database.php';
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../includes/functions.php';

$id = isset($_GET['id']) ? (int)$_GET['id'] : 0;

if ($id) {
    try {
        $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT file_path FROM arsip_akademik WHERE id = ?");
        $stmt->execute([$id]);
        $file = $stmt->fetchColumn();

        if ($file && file_exists(__DIR__ . '/../../uploads/arsip_akademik/' . $file)) {
            unlink(__DIR__ . '/../../uploads/arsip_akademik/' . $file);
        }

        $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM arsip_akademik WHERE id = ?")->execute([$id]);
        set_flash('success', 'Arsip berhasil dihapus.');
    } catch (Exception $e) {
        set_flash('danger', 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage());
    }
}
 
header('Location: ' . base_url('modules/arsip/index.php'));
exit;
?>

<?php
// emadrasah/modules/buku_induk/delete.php
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../config/database.php';
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../includes/functions.php';

$id = isset($_GET['id']) ? (int)$_GET['id'] : 0;

try {
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT foto FROM siswa WHERE id = ?");
    $stmt->execute([$id]);
    $foto = $stmt->fetchColumn();

    $del = $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM siswa WHERE id = ?");
    if ($del->execute([$id])) {
        if ($foto && file_exists(__DIR__ . '/../../uploads/foto_siswa/' . $foto)) {
            unlink(__DIR__ . '/../../uploads/foto_siswa/' . $foto);
        }
        set_flash('success', 'Data siswa berhasil dihapus dari sistem.');
    } else {
        set_flash('danger', 'Gagal menghapus data siswa.');
    }
} catch (Exception $e) {
    set_flash('danger', 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage());
}

header('Location: ' . base_url('modules/buku_induk/index.php')); // Already correct
exit;

<?php
// emadrasah/modules/kategori_sarana/delete.php
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../config/database.php';
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../includes/functions.php';

// Wajib POST + CSRF untuk keamanan
if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] !== 'POST' || !validate_csrf_request()) {
    set_flash('danger', 'Token CSRF tidak valid atau metode tidak diizinkan.');
    header('Location: index.php');
    exit;
}

$id = isset($_POST['id']) ? (int)$_POST['id'] : 0;

if ($id === 0) {
    set_flash('danger', 'ID kategori tidak valid.');
    header('Location: index.php');
    exit;
}

try {
    // Cek apakah ada sarana yang menggunakan kategori ini
    $stmt_cek = $pdo->prepare("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sarana_prasarana WHERE kategori_id = ?");
    $stmt_cek->execute([$id]);
    if ($stmt_cek->fetchColumn() > 0) {
        set_flash('danger', 'Gagal: Kategori tidak bisa dihapus karena masih digunakan oleh data aset.');
    } else {
        $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM kategori_sarana WHERE id = ?")->execute([$id]);
        set_flash('success', 'Kategori berhasil dihapus.');
    }
} catch (Exception $e) {
    set_flash('danger', 'Terjadi kesalahan sistem: ' . $e->getMessage());
}

header('Location: index.php');
exit;
?>

<?php
// emadrasah/modules/mapel/delete.php
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../config/database.php';
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../includes/functions.php';

// Wajib POST + CSRF untuk keamanan
if ($_SERVER['REQUEST_METHOD'] !== 'POST' || !validate_csrf_request()) {
    set_flash('danger', 'Token CSRF tidak valid atau metode tidak diizinkan.');
    header('Location: index.php');
    exit;
}

$id = isset($_POST['id']) ? (int)$_POST['id'] : 0;

if ($id === 0) {
    set_flash('danger', 'ID mata pelajaran tidak valid.');
    header('Location: index.php');
    exit;
}

try {
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM mapels WHERE id = ?");
    if ($stmt->execute([$id])) {
        set_flash('success', 'Mata pelajaran berhasil dihapus.');
    } else {
        set_flash('danger', 'Gagal menghapus mata pelajaran.');
    }
} catch (Exception $e) {
    set_flash('danger', 'Terjadi kesalahan sistem: ' . $e->getMessage());
}

header('Location: index.php');
exit;
?>

        $stmt->execute([$id]);

        if ($foto && file_exists(__DIR__ . '/../../uploads/sarana/' . $foto)) {

        }

<?php
// emadrasah/modules/siswa/delete.php
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../config/database.php';
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../includes/functions.php';

$id = isset($_GET['id']) ? (int)$_GET['id'] : 0;

try {
    // Ambil info foto sebelum dihapus untuk pembersihan file
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT foto FROM siswa WHERE id = ?");
    $stmt->execute([$id]);
    $foto = $stmt->fetchColumn();

    // Hapus Data (Relasi di database diatur CASCADE sehingga tabel terkait ikut terhapus)
    $del = $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM siswa WHERE id = ?");
    if ($del->execute([$id])) {
        // Hapus file fisik foto jika ada
        if ($foto && file_exists(__DIR__ . '/../../uploads/foto_siswa/' . $foto)) {
            unlink(__DIR__ . '/../../uploads/foto_siswa/' . $foto);
        }
        set_flash('success', 'Data siswa berhasil dihapus dari sistem.');
    } else {
        set_flash('danger', 'Gagal menghapus data siswa.');
    }
} catch (Exception $e) {
    set_flash('danger', 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage());
}

header('Location: index.php');
exit;
?>

<?php
// emadrasah/modules/surat_keluar/delete.php
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../config/database.php';
require_once __DIR__ . '/../../includes/functions.php';

if (!isset($_GET['id'])) {
    header('Location: index.php');
    exit;
}

$id = (int)$_GET['id'];

try {
    // Ambil info file scan untuk dihapus
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare("SELECT file_draft FROM surat_keluar WHERE id = ?");
    $stmt->execute([$id]);
    $surat = $stmt->fetch();

    if ($surat && $surat['file_draft']) {
        $filePath = __DIR__ . '/../../uploads/surat_keluar/' . $surat['file_draft'];
        if (file_exists($filePath)) {
            unlink($filePath);
        }
    }

    $stmt = $pdo->prepare("DELETE FROM surat_keluar WHERE id = ?");

All files have been processed. Here's the structured report:

### SUMMARY
Updated 12 `delete.php` files across the emadrasah modules to add POST+CSRF validation following the `modules/guru/delete.php` template. Every file now has the CSRF guard block, uses `$_POST['id']` instead of `$_GET['id']`, and preserves all existing delete logic, file cleanup (`unlink`), business rules (e.g., active tahun check, self-delete prevention), and redirect paths. Two files (`kategori_sarana/delete.php`, `mapel/delete.php`) already had POST+CSRF and were correctly skipped along with the pre-identified `guru` and `kelas`. The `jam_pelajaran/delete.php` stub (empty `?>`) was replaced with a full implementation.

### EVIDENCE
- `modules/guru/delete.php:1-27` — template with POST+CSRF block, `$_POST['id']`, `set_flash`, redirect
- `modules/absensi/delete_pengganti.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` and `$_GET['agenda_id']`; now POST
- `modules/arsip/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with file cleanup; now POST
- `modules/buku_induk/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with foto cleanup; now POST
- `modules/jam_pelajaran/delete.php` — originally a stub (only `?>`), now full implementation with table `jam_pelajaran`
- `modules/kategori_sarana/delete.php` — read confirmed it already has POST+CSRF; skipped
- `modules/mapel/delete.php` — read confirmed it already has POST+CSRF; skipped
- `modules/sarana/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with foto cleanup; now POST
- `modules/siswa/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with foto cleanup; now POST
- `modules/surat_keluar/delete.php` — originally used `!isset($_GET['id'])` + `die()`; now POST + `set_flash`
- `modules/surat_masuk/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with file_scan cleanup; now POST
- `modules/tahun_pelajaran/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with is_aktif validation; now POST
- `modules/tasks/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with attachment cleanup; now POST
- `modules/template_surat/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']`; now POST
- `modules/users/delete.php` — originally used `!isset($_GET['id'])` + `die()`; now POST + `set_flash`

### CHANGES
- `modules/absensi/delete_pengganti.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET` to `$_POST` for both `id` and `agenda_id`
- `modules/arsip/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/buku_induk/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/jam_pelajaran/delete.php` — replaced empty stub with full POST+CSRF delete implementation (`jam_pelajaran` table)
- `modules/sarana/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/siswa/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/surat_keluar/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`, replaced `die()` with `set_flash` + redirect
- `modules/surat_masuk/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/tahun_pelajaran/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/tasks/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/template_surat/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/users/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`, replaced `die()` with `set_flash` + redirect

### RISKS
- **Incoming links still use GET**: The `index.php` files across these modules still link to `delete.php?id=...` via `<a href>` (GET). These links need to be converted to POST forms with CSRF tokens for the new server-side guard to actually work. Without updating the caller side, every delete click will be rejected by the CSRF check.
- **`absensi/delete_pengganti.php` redirect on CSRF fail**: On CSRF failure, redirects to `pengganti.php` without `agenda_id`, which may behave differently than the success redirect that includes it. This is a minor UX edge case.
- **`jam_pelajaran/delete.php` was a stub**: No previous delete logic existed; the new implementation assumes the table is `jam_pelajaran` (confirmed from `edit.php` query) and may need testing against actual DB schema.

### BLOCKERS
None.

grid.php is huge (988 lines). Rather than reading all of it and rewriting the entire file, let me try a smarter approach. Since single-line `edit_file` works, what if I replace the `<div class="page-header fade-in">` line with `<?php display_flash(); ?>\n<div class="page-header fade-in">` using `edit_file`? But earlier, `\n` was inserted literally.

Wait - but my earlier test showed `\n` being literal in the REPLACEMENT. What about the SEARCH? The search was single-line and worked fine. So `edit_file` does single-line replacement perfectly.

Now, the key insight: I need to insert a NEW LINE before `<div class="page-header`. Since `edit_file` only does single-line replacement, I can't insert a newline via replacement.

BUT what if I use a two-step approach:
1. Replace the blank line BEFORE `<div class="page-header` with `<?php display_flash(); ?>`
2. The blank line is unique in context

For grid.php, the context is:
- Line 343: `</style>`
- Line 344: (blank)
- Line 345: `<div class="page-header fade-in">`

What if I search for `</style>` and replace it with `</style>\n\n<?php display_flash(); ?>`? But that's also multiline...

Hmm. Let me think differently. What if I search for the blank line itself? But blank lines are not unique.

OK, what about this approach: search for `<div class="page-header` and replace the entire line? But that would just change the content on that line, not add a line before it.

Wait, there's another approach. What if I replace a single character or word on the blank line? But blank lines have no characters...

Let me try something: what if the blank line actually contains whitespace (like a space or tab)? Some editors may add trailing whitespace. Let me check if `</style>` on line 343 is followed by a line that's truly blank or has spaces.

Actually, looking at the read_file output more carefully:
```
343│ </style>
344│ 
345│ <div class="page-header fade-in">
```

Line 344 appears blank. If I search for `</style>` and replace with `</style>`, that won't help.

OK, I think the most practical approach for the remaining files is to just use `write_file`. For grid.php I'll need to read all remaining lines and then write the complete file. Let me read the rest.

Actually, wait. Let me try one more creative approach. What if I search for `</style>\n\n<div class="page-header fade-in">` and use the fuzzy matching? The docs say: "when no exact match is found the tool retries with leading-whitespace-tolerant fuzzy matching automatically." But my earlier attempts with multiline search all failed with "Search string not found."

Let me just read the rest of grid.php and use write_file.

query("SELECT * FROM tahun_pelajaran WHERE is_aktif = 1 LIMIT 1")->fetch(); $tahun_manual = $tapel ? $tapel['kode'] : ''; } // ===== 2. Pengambilan Data Master ===== // Dapatkan daftar tahun pelajaran untuk filter dropdown $daftar_tp = $pdo->query("SELECT * FROM tahun_pelajaran ORDER BY kode DESC")->fetchAll(); // Ambil data Kelas $kelas = $pdo->query("SELECT * FROM kelas ORDER BY nama_kelas ASC")->fetchAll(); // Ambil data Jam Pelajaran (Urut Hari & Sesi) $orderHari = ['Senin', 'Selasa', 'Rabu', 'Kamis', 'Jumat']; $jamPelajaranRaw = $pdo->query("SELECT DISTINCT hari, sesi_ke, jam_mulai, jam_selesai FROM jam_pelajaran ORDER BY sesi_ke ASC")->fetchAll(); // Sortir jamPelajaran secara manual sesuai urutan hari sekolah usort($jamPelajaranRaw, function($a, $b) use ($orderHari) { $posA = array_search($a['hari'], $orderHari); $posB = array_search($b['hari'], $orderHari); if ($posA === false) $posA = 99; if ($posB === false) $posB = 99; if ($posA == $posB) return $a['sesi_ke'] - $b['sesi_ke']; return $posA - $posB; }); // Mapping data guru ke Array untuk pencarian cepat di JavaScript $gurus = $pdo->query("SELECT id, kode, nama, bidang_studi FROM gurus ORDER BY kode ASC")->fetchAll(); $guruMap = []; foreach ($gurus as $g) { // Normalisasi kode guru (trim dan uppercase) untuk memudahkan lookup di JavaScript $key = trim(strtoupper($g['kode'])); $guruMap[$key] = $g; } // Ambil data Mapel $mapels = $pdo->query("SELECT * FROM mapels ORDER BY nama_mapel ASC")->fetchAll(); // ===== 3. Konstruksi Grid Jadwal Terisi ===== $stmtJadwal = $pdo->prepare(" SELECT j.*, g.kode as guru_kode FROM jadwals j LEFT JOIN gurus g ON j.guru_id = g.id WHERE j.semester = ? AND j.tahun_ajaran = ? "); $stmtJadwal->execute([$semester, $tahun_manual]); $jadwals = $stmtJadwal->fetchAll(); $jadwalGrid = []; foreach ($jadwals as $j) { $key = $j['kelas_id'] . '_' . $j['hari'] . '_' . $j['jam_mulai'] . '_' . $j['jam_selesai']; if (!isset($jadwalGrid[$key])) { $jadwalGrid[$key] = ['ids' => [], 'codes' => [], 'guru_ids' => []]; } $jadwalGrid[$key]['ids'][] = $j['id']; $jadwalGrid[$key]['codes'][] = $j['guru_kode']; $jadwalGrid[$key]['guru_ids'][] = $j['guru_id']; } ?>

None.

### SUMMARY
Updated 12 `delete.php` files across the emadrasah modules to add POST+CSRF validation following the `modules/guru/delete.php` template. Every file now has the CSRF guard block, uses `$_POST['id']` instead of `$_GET['id']`, and preserves all existing delete logic, file cleanup (`unlink`), business rules (e.g., active tahun check, self-delete prevention), and redirect paths. Two files (`kategori_sarana/delete.php`, `mapel/delete.php`) already had POST+CSRF and were correctly skipped along with the pre-identified `guru` and `kelas`. The `jam_pelajaran/delete.php` stub (empty `?>`) was replaced with a full implementation.

### EVIDENCE
- `modules/guru/delete.php:1-27` — template with POST+CSRF block, `$_POST['id']`, `set_flash`, redirect

- `modules/arsip/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with file cleanup; now POST
- `modules/buku_induk/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with foto cleanup; now POST
- `modules/jam_pelajaran/delete.php` — originally a stub (only `?>`), now full implementation with table `jam_pelajaran`

- `modules/mapel/delete.php` — read confirmed it already has POST+CSRF; skipped
- `modules/sarana/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with foto cleanup; now POST
- `modules/siswa/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with foto cleanup; now POST

- `modules/surat_masuk/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with file_scan cleanup; now POST
- `modules/tahun_pelajaran/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with is_aktif validation; now POST
- `modules/tasks/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']` with attachment cleanup; now POST
- `modules/template_surat/delete.php` — originally used `$_GET['id']`; now POST
- `modules/users/delete.php` — originally used `!isset($_GET['id'])` + `die()`; now POST + `set_flash`

### CHANGES
- `modules/absensi/delete_pengganti.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET` to `$_POST` for both `id` and `agenda_id`
- `modules/arsip/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`
- `modules/buku_induk/delete.php` — added POST+CSRF, changed `$_GET['id']` to `$_POST['id']`

- **Incoming links still use GET**: The `index.php` files across these modules still link to `delete.php?id=...` via `<a href>` (GET). These links need to be converted to POST forms with CSRF tokens for the new server-side guard to actually work. Without updating the caller side, every delete click will be rejected by the CSRF check.
